channel.title: GitHub Rust Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: astral-sh/uv
item.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

item.title: tauri-apps/tauri
item.description: Build smaller, faster, and more secure desktop and mobile applications with a web frontend.

item.title: succinctlabs/sp1
item.description: The fastest, most feature-complete zkVM for developers.

item.title: mxsm/rocketmq-rust
item.description: 🚀Apache RocketMQ Rust🦀 implementation. Faster, safer, and with lower memory usage.

item.title: nexus-xyz/nexus-zkvm
item.description: The Nexus zkVM: The zero-knowledge virtual machine

item.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
item.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, mobile, and more.

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: jdx/mise
item.description: dev tools, env vars, task runner

item.title: tensorzero/tensorzero
item.description: TensorZero creates a feedback loop for optimizing LLM applications — turning production data into smarter, faster, and cheaper models.

item.title: astral-sh/ruff
item.description: An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.

item.title: getzola/zola
item.description: A fast static site generator in a single binary with everything built-in. https://www.getzola.org

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: ankitects/anki
item.description: Anki's shared backend and web components, and the Qt frontend

item.title: woodruffw/zizmor
item.description: A static analysis tool for GitHub Actions

item.title: huggingface/tokenizers
item.description: 💥 Fast State-of-the-Art Tokenizers optimized for Research and Production

item.title: GreptimeTeam/greptimedb
item.description: An open-source, cloud-native, unified time series database for metrics, logs and events with SQL/PromQL supported. Available on GreptimeCloud.

item.title: loco-rs/loco
item.description: 🚂 🦀 The one-person framework for Rust for side-projects and startups

item.title: paradigmxyz/reth
item.description: Modular, contributor-friendly and blazing-fast implementation of the Ethereum protocol, in Rust

item.title: eza-community/eza
item.description: A modern alternative to ls

item.title: qdrant/qdrant
item.description: Qdrant - High-performance, massive-scale Vector Database and Vector Search Engine for the next generation of AI. Also available in the cloud https://cloud.qdrant.io/

item.title: Orange-OpenSource/hurl
item.description: Hurl, run and test HTTP requests with plain text.

item.title: Schniz/fnm
item.description: 🚀 Fast and simple Node.js version manager, built in Rust
